title: Filipino-Style Garlic Bun
description: A sweet and savory bun filled with a garlicky and herby Filipino-inspired filling. Perfect as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Brush the tops of the buns with fry oil and bake for 5 minutes.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the Filipino stir-fry mix and cook according to package instructions.
Split the buns in half and fill with the garlicky filling.
Optional: top with chopped herbs or a drizzle of sweet chili sauce.
